# youtrack_rest_settings (Resource)

YouTrack REST API settings configuration

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_rest_settings" "example" {
  allow_all_origins = false
  allowed_origins = [
    "https://example.com",
    "https://api.example.com"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `allow_all_origins` (Boolean) Whether to allow CORS requests from all origins
- `allowed_origins` (List of String) List of allowed origins for CORS requests

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) REST settings identifier
- `last_updated` (String) Timestamp of the last update

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# REST settings is a singleton resource.
# You can use any value for the import ID (it will be ignored).
# The resource will fetch the current REST settings.
terraform import youtrack_rest_settings.example global
```
